name: New RM trying but unsure
description: Makes effort but lacks confidence, structure, or ability to move from rapport to need analysis.
behavior: Shows willingness and effort but struggles with structured customer conversations and conversion flow.
cm_treatment: Use SBI + enabling approach. Give tools, scripts, joint-call support, and small achievable tasks. Avoid heavy criticism.
impact: LGs may support the RM if they see effort and CM-backed preparation.
